de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class StatementBlock

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.JavaStatement
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.StatementBlock
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TypeDeclarationContainer, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, TypeScope, VariableScope, SVSubstitute, ProgramPrefix
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ContextStatementBlock

    public class StatementBlock
extends JavaStatement
implements StatementContainer, TypeDeclarationContainer, VariableScope, TypeScope, ProgramPrefix
    Statement block. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

      • getFirstElement

        public SourceElement getFirstElement()
        Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
        Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
        Specified by:
        getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
        Overrides:
        getFirstElement in class JavaSourceElement
        Returns:
        the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
        See Also:
        JavaSourceElement.toSource(), JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

        public SourceElement getFirstElementIncludingBlocks()
        Description copied from interface: SourceElement
        Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
        Specified by:

        Overrides:
        getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in class JavaSourceElement
        Returns:
        the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
        See Also:
        SourceElement.getStartPosition()
